changes.reason: Activate the dormant pin-avoid attribution sleeve only in VALID_0DTE routing, preserving all existing core VALID_0DTE profiles and keeping missing/stale routing unchanged.
Config-only probe to see whether existing playbook pin-avoid logic captures the charm/pin tail state that currently remains inside charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should either create a small, separately attributed VALID_0DTE pin-avoid sample or prove the dormant profile is unreachable. Promotion requires total net profit retention >=98% of run_029, protected charm-pin fast-winner retention >=95%, no trade starvation, slow_12h still zero, and combined charm/pin worst MAE flat or better. Main tradeoff is cannibalizing profitable charm_pin_pullback_long flow without improving MAE.
recommendation.label: dormant-pin-avoid-attribution
recommendation.rationale: Use the dormant concept activation exception as one logical config-only family. The current leader is already strong, while repeated direct 1DTE tightening, call-wall loosening, broad hidden-signature pruning, no-0DTE compression, and latest charm-wall cap geometry have either hurt score or suppressed profit. The unresolved risk is charm/pin path-dependent MAE: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1325.1 with fast median hold but owns the -513.4 worst MAE. Since static broad filters overlap protected extended-VWAP winners, the cleaner next test is attribution: let the existing dormant charm_wall_pin_avoid_long playbook compete only in VALID_0DTE and measure whether it separates tail/pin states without touching core exits or global vetoes.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 34 VALID_0DTE trades, $1325.1 PnL, 200.35 PnL/exposure hour, and fast 3.8 minute median hold, but owns the global -513.4 MAE. charm_wall_breakaway_long adds convex PnL but is fragile. The strategist explicitly identified dormant pin-avoid attribution as a config-only split candidate.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize profitable charm-pin/charm-wall winners without reducing worst MAE or exposure. Reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_029 or protected fast-winner retention is below 95%.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm/pin context where existing charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long entries show pin-avoid or rejection risk.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE while total score is flat or better, net profit remains >=98% of run_029, completed trades remain within 10%, and slow_12h stays 0.
